texts.label: text
texts.orig: IN EXERCISE of powers conferred by Regulation 6 (1) ( d ) of the National Assembly and Presidential Elections (Registration of
texts.text: IN EXERCISE of powers conferred by Regulation 6 (1) ( d ) of the National Assembly and Presidential Elections (Registration of

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Electors) Regulations, section 38 of the Constitution of Kenya Review Act and regulation 21 (2) ( a )  of  the  Constitution  of Kenya  (Review) Referendum Regulations, the Interim Independent Electoral Commission notifies the voters of Mukuru Kaiyaba Primary School in Makadara Constituency; Code 001, Nairobi that the polling centre has been transferred to Bright Star Academy .
texts.text: Electors) Regulations, section 38 of the Constitution of Kenya Review Act and regulation 21 (2) ( a )  of  the  Constitution  of Kenya  (Review) Referendum Regulations, the Interim Independent Electoral Commission notifies the voters of Mukuru Kaiyaba Primary School in Makadara Constituency; Code 001, Nairobi that the polling centre has been transferred to Bright Star Academy .

texts.label: text
texts.orig: AND THAT the reason(s) for the transfer is (are) as follows:
texts.text: AND THAT the reason(s) for the transfer is (are) as follows:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Mukuru  Kaiyaba  Primary  School  is  under  construction  and  the contractor  has  denied  access  for  polling  day  activities  for  fear  of destruction of the property in the likelihood of poll violence.
texts.text: Mukuru  Kaiyaba  Primary  School  is  under  construction  and  the contractor  has  denied  access  for  polling  day  activities  for  fear  of destruction of the property in the likelihood of poll violence.
